---
  title: "Blog"
---

This is a collection of some posts, in no particular order other than the year.
Also: This may not be the height of wisdom, but it's what I knew at the time of writing.
  
- 2023
  - [Solving Sudoku with Convolution Neural Network](sudoku-solver.html)
  - [Creating a website with R](website-with-R.html)
